bird.summary: The marsh tapaculo (Scytalopus iraiensis) is a recently discovered passerine bird which belongs to the genus Scytalopus, a genus of tapacul…

locations.name: 巴拉那州
locations.summary: 巴拉那州 （葡萄牙語：Paraná，葡萄牙語發音：[pa.ɾa.'na]）是巴西的一個州，位於該國南部。東為大西洋，西隔巴拉那河與阿根廷和巴拉圭相望。面積199,282平方公里，2005年人口10,387,378人。首府库里蒂巴。 行政區…

locations.name: 南里奥格兰德州
locations.summary: 南里奥格兰德州（葡萄牙語：Rio Grande do Sul，直译：「南方的大河」，發音：[ˈʁiw ˈɡɾɐ̃dʒi du ˈsuw] ），或称南大河州，是巴西最南端的一个州，东临大西洋，首府阿雷格里港，人口10,963,216。该州与…

locations.name: 米纳斯吉拉斯州
locations.summary: 米纳斯吉拉斯州（葡萄牙語：Minas Gerais，[ˈminɐz ʒeˈɾajs] ；直译：「一般〔普通〕的矿山」）是巴西东南部一个州，人口约两千万。是巴西第二人口大州，国内生产总值也排名全国第三。该州以山、瀑布、历史名城、宝石，以及盛…

relations.subject: Marsh tapaculo
relations.evidence: Until recently it was generally believed to be restricted to about two dozen sites in the eastern part of Paraná and Rio Grande do Sul, but has now been discovered in the highlands of Minas Gerais – far north of its previously known range. It occurs in seasonally flooded grassland in the floodplains of rivers

relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Marsh tapaculo
relations.evidence: Threats include drainage, sand extraction, burning of grassland and the flooding of land due to the construction of dams
relations.object_summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。
